'''H'ratth''' was a lush [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a [[Jedi Academy (H'ratth)|Jedi Academy]] where [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Chamma]] [[Jedi training/Legends|taught]] [[Andur Sunrider]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] ways in [[4001 BBY]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Vima Sunrider]]. The academy was known for its training of [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healers]].

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', a reference book published in [[2009]], placed the [[H'ratth system/Legends|H'ratth system]] in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> However, the [[Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion|''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion]], published on [[StarWars.com|the official ''Star Wars'' website]] after the release of the ''Atlas'', located the [[Star system/Legends|system]] (and consequently the planet) in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="TEAOC" /> It was mentioned in [[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']], where it was mentioned that Jedi healers were often trained on the planet.<ref name="The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force real-life book">[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force (real-life book)|''The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force'']]</ref>
